title: When They Said They Were Not Looking for Anything Serious
subtitle: A field guide to mixed signals and what people actually mean.
summary: From soft launches to slow fades, here is what readers asked about most this week in modern dating.
brandExplainer: The Kiss and Tell is a weekly letter on dating, relationships, and the stories we do not forget.
disclaimer: Disclaimer: All names and identifiable details have been modified to protect the reputations of our contributors in the eyes of their partners, colleagues, and parents.
